summary: Walkthrough documenting the update of generateYeuCau function across 7 subject HTML files (Chemistry, Biology, Literature, History, Geography, KTPL, IT). Each file's yeuCauMap was changed from Physics topic IDs to subject-specific IDs matching the physicsTopics data array, ensuring the 'Yêu cầu cần đạt' column in specification tables displays correct curriculum-aligned content.
